auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

language.title: Language
language.desc: Select your preferred language. The app will update immediately.
language.note: Language change applies to the main app sections only.

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Choose your preferred appearance. Changes apply immediately.

documents.title: Documents
documents.instructions: Upload clear photos of your documents. Accepted formats: JPG, PNG. Maximum file size: 5MB.
documents.uploadSuccess: {{label}} has been uploaded and is pending review.
documents.footerNote: Documents are reviewed by the admin team. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
documents.fileTooLarge: The selected file exceeds the size limit.
documents.unsupportedFormat: This file format is not supported.
documents.storageNotConfigured: Storage is not configured. Please contact support.
documents.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please allow access in settings.
documents.networkError: A network error occurred during upload.
documents.driverLicenseDesc: Upload the front and back of your valid driver's license.
documents.nationalIdDesc: Upload a clear photo of your national ID card.

accountStatus.title: Account Status
accountStatus.verifiedDesc: Your account is fully verified. You can accept deliveries.
accountStatus.verifyingDesc: Submit your documents to get verified and start accepting deliveries.
accountStatus.allSet: You're all set! Your account is verified and you can accept deliveries.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.achievement2Desc: Complete 10 deliveries in your first week

confirmDelivery.title: Confirm Delivery
confirmDelivery.verificationDesc: Please verify delivery to complete the order.

reportIssue.title: Report Issue
reportIssue.subtitle: Select the issue type and provide details. This will not cancel the order.
reportIssue.submittedDesc: Your issue has been recorded. You can return to the delivery flow.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDesc: You'll see updates about your deliveries here

notificationsSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationsSettings.pushDesc: Receive push notifications for order updates
notificationsSettings.emailDesc: Receive email notifications for account updates
notificationsSettings.smsDesc: Receive SMS notifications for important updates
notificationsSettings.orderUpdatesDesc: Notifications about new orders and status changes

conversations.title: Chat
conversations.emptyDesc: Start a delivery to begin chatting

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: Manage your privacy preferences. Your data is protected and never shared without your consent.
privacy.dataSharingDesc: Allow anonymous data sharing to improve delivery recommendations
privacy.locationTrackingDesc: Allow the app to access your location for real-time tracking
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help us improve by sending anonymous usage data

help.title: Help & Support
help.desc: Find answers to common questions or contact our support team.
help.faq1q: How do I start receiving orders?
help.faq1a: Make sure you are online and your documents are verified. Available orders will appear on the Orders screen.
help.faq2a: Earnings are calculated daily and payouts are processed weekly to your registered bank account.
help.faq3q: How do I update my vehicle information?
help.faq3a: Go to Profile > Vehicle Information to update your vehicle type, plate number, and color.
help.faq4q: What if I encounter a problem during delivery?
help.faq4a: Use the Report a Problem option during an active delivery, or contact support from the Help section.
help.contactDesc: Email us at support@fulldelivery.com or call our hotline.

about.title: About
about.description: FullDelivery is a complete delivery management platform for drivers. Manage orders, track earnings, and grow your delivery business.

error.networkError: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
error.accessDenied: You do not have access to this order
error.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.fileTooLarge: The selected file exceeds the size limit.
error.unsupportedFormat: This file format is not supported.
error.storageNotConfigured: Storage is not configured. Please contact support.
error.uploadTimeout: Upload timed out. Please try again.
